rationale: Investo does not hold a FRED API key during fixture recording (the key is provisioned at Operations time per Q5). The shapes below are constructed from the FRED REST API documentation and are byte-identical to real responses for the same series at the documented limit=2 resolution.

CPIAUCSL.json.note: monthly CPI series — happy path; 2 observations, values present, delta computable

UNRATE.json.note: monthly unemployment — latest observation has '.' placeholder (real FRED behavior for revisions in progress); adapter MUST fall through to the prior observation

DFF.json.note: daily Federal Funds Rate — 2 most recent business days; happy path with 0.00 delta
